lesson: Luna beats Terra on the user's price-intelligence preference
rule: Use Luna max for executor-safe delegated slices and avoid Terra unless the user changes this preference

lesson: An unbounded long-running goal consumed far more tokens than the user expected
rule: Surface token usage at meaningful checkpoints and obtain an explicit budget before resuming expensive delegated execution

lesson: Known loopback integration tests fail with EPERM in the restricted sandbox
rule: Run identified loopback suites with approved local-port access instead of repeating a sandbox-only failure

lesson: The IPv6 special-purpose registry is not an exhaustive allowlist of globally eligible destinations
rule: Define positive eligible address space before subtracting special deprecated and phased-out prefixes and test false edge controls adversarially

lesson: Full structural validation can still miss request identity when parallel load and save success branches diverge
rule: Apply and test the same identity invariant independently at every repository success boundary

lesson: An installed model listed by the OpenAI-compatible endpoint may still have no loaded runtime instance
rule: Check the native model list loaded_instances before interpreting an empty benchmark as a transport or selection failure

lesson: Provider JSON Schema engines support different keyword subsets and reasoning modes can break JSON-only contracts
rule: Keep provider schemas portable enforce the full contract locally disable thinking explicitly and size token ceilings from the declared output maximum

lesson: LM Studio may place grammar-constrained Qwen output in reasoning_content while leaving ordinary content empty
rule: Accept only explicit provider-authored envelope fields under exact structural conditions and run the same closed validator without semantic repair

lesson: Treating expected semantic labels as schema validity discards valid candidate output and biases every downstream metric
rule: Separate closed structure and evidence validation from exact classification scoring while retaining provider-authored values for synthetic evaluation
